title: An Ordinance Amending Section 3 of Municipal Ordinance No. 2014-1310 Dated March 3, 2014 Entitled "an Ordinance Creating the Posirions of Municipal Government Deparment Head I HRMO) and Human Resource Management Assistant in Which the HRMO Unis Is Converted / Upgraded to a Department Providing Its Composition, Compensation, Salary Fgrade and Defining Its Functions and Qualifications Standards and Appropriating Funds Thereof."
